## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change belongs in the read-only evidence layer.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate.py` from this checkout's isolated environment.
- [ ] Behavior changes have synthetic regression coverage.
- [ ] Public schema changes update the matching schema, examples, and consumer documentation.
- [ ] I verified the change does not add tracker mutation authority.

## Privacy and repository hygiene

- [ ] This PR contains no private issue text, tracker exports, raw reports, prompts, credentials, local paths, model/cache files, or private evaluation artifacts.
- [ ] Any evaluation claim links to aggregate evidence and states its corpus limitations.
- [ ] `git status --short` contains only intentional files.

## Compatibility

Note any CLI, schema, tracker-version, platform, or plugin impact. Write “None” when unchanged.
